steps.t: Offram has given you the hides you need. Thread can be obtained from Nothgyth in the southern part of the city. Ordbéorth in the northern part of the …
The infirmary's sewing-table can be found outside the infirmary in Eaworth. Offram asked you to sew warm blankets for the people of Eaworth.
People in need of warm blankets can be found throughout Eaworth. Offram wants you to deliver the warm blankets you sewed to the people of Eaworth.
Offram stands guard outside the Vendor Hall in Eaworth. You should let Offram know that you have delivered the blankets as he had asked.
